title: AI Could Delete EVERYTHING! Businesses Ignored This! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof highlights security threats in agentic AI systems including prompt injection, data deletion, and unauthorized actions. The video argues that businesses have overlooked these risks despite the technology's potential and remain hesitant to adopt agentic AI.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof flags security threats in agentic AI systems: prompt injection, data deletion, and unauthorized actions taken by agents. The argument is that businesses have overlooked these risks even as the technology shows potential, leaving many hesitant to adopt agentic AI. The takeaway is that agent autonomy introduces attack surfaces that have to be addressed before wider deployment.
